description: ANALYST issues VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 following second ACTION_COMPLETED by CLOUD_CODE (commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39). Both smoke validation executions confirm all five autonomous loop integrity checks passing: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter active (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch and AUDITOR routing present (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains valid ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. Proof artifact governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json updated with current timestamp and pass status. ANALYST asserts all autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied. AUDITOR must independently inspect governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files on main branch and issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED to close TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 and advance to next roadmap phase, or VERIFICATION_FAILED with stated defect if criteria are not met.
